member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireSqlServerEFCoreSqlClientExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring EntityFrameworkCore DbContext to Azure SQL, MS SQL server
Registers the given as a service in the services provided by the . Enables db context pooling, retries, health check, logging and telemetry for the .
member.typeparam: The that needs to be registered.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
A name used to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional delegate that can be used for customizing options. It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional delegate to configure the for the context.
member.remarks: Reads the configuration from "Aspire:Microsoft:EntityFrameworkCore:SqlServer:{typeof(TContext).Name}" config section, or "Aspire:Microsoft:EntityFrameworkCore:SqlServer" if former does not exist.
member.exception: Thrown when mandatory is not provided.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireSqlServerEFCoreSqlClientExtensions.EnrichSqlServerDbContext``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings})
member.summary: Configures retries, health check, logging and telemetry for the .
member.exception: Thrown when mandatory is not registered in DI.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.

member.name: T:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings
member.summary: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a SQL Server database using EntityFrameworkCore.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: The connection string of the SQL server database to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings.DisableRetry
member.summary: Gets or sets whether retries should be disabled.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings.DisableHealthChecks
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the database health check is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings.DisableTracing
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.MicrosoftEntityFrameworkCoreSqlServerSettings.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the time in seconds to wait for the command to execute.

member.name: T:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute
member.summary: Attribute used to automatically generate a JSON schema for a component's configuration.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Path
member.summary: The path corresponding to which config section binds to.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Type
member.summary: The type that is bound to the configuration. This type will be walked and generate a JSON schema for all the properties.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.ExclusionPaths
member.summary: (optional) The config sections to exclude from the ConfigurationSchema. This is useful if there are properties you don't want to publicize in the config schema.

member.name: T:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute
member.summary: Provides information to describe the logging categories produced by a component.

member.name: P:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute.Categories
member.summary: The list of log categories produced by the component. These categories will show up under the Logging:LogLevel section in appsettings.json.

member.name: M:Aspire.HealthChecksExtensions.TryAddHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.HealthCheckRegistration)
member.summary: Adds a HealthCheckRegistration if one hasn't already been added to the builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.HealthChecksExtensions.TryAddHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHealthChecksBuilder})
member.summary: Invokes the action if the given hasn't already been added to the builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.EntityFrameworkUtils.GetDbContextSettings``2(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.String,System.Action{``1,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration})
member.summary: Binds the DbContext specific configuration section to settings when available.

member.name: M:Aspire.EntityFrameworkUtils.CheckDbContextRegistered``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures a is registered in DI.

member.name: M:Aspire.EntityFrameworkUtils.PatchServiceDescriptor``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder{``0}},System.String)
member.summary: Enriches the DbContext options service descriptor with custom alterations.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.Implementation.SqlActivitySourceHelper
member.summary: Helper class to hold common properties used by both SqlClientDiagnosticListener on .NET Core and SqlEventSourceListener on .NET Framework.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.Implementation.SqlClientInstrumentationEventSource
member.summary: EventSource events emitted from the project.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientInstrumentation
member.summary: SqlClient instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientInstrumentation.#ctor(OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions
member.summary: Options for .

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.NamedPipeRegex
member.summary: In a Data Source string like "np:\\serverName\pipe\MSSQL$instanceName\pipeName" match the "pipe\MSSQL$instanceName" segment to extract instanceName if it is available.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.SetDbStatementForStoredProcedure
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the should add the names of commands as the tag. Default value: .

para.b: SetDbStatementForStoredProcedure is only supported on .NET and .NET Core runtimes.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.SetDbStatementForText
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the should add the text of commands as the tag. Default value: .

para.b: WARNING: SetDbStatementForText will capture the raw CommandText. Make sure your CommandText property never contains any sensitive data.
SetDbStatementForText is supported on all runtimes.

list.item: On .NET and .NET Core SetDbStatementForText only applies to SqlCommands with .

On .NET Framework SetDbStatementForText applies to all SqlCommands regardless of .
When using System.Data.SqlClient use SetDbStatementForText to capture StoredProcedure command names.
When using Microsoft.Data.SqlClient use SetDbStatementForText to capture Text, StoredProcedure, and all other command text.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnableConnectionLevelAttributes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the should parse the DataSource on a SqlConnection into server name, instance name, and/or port connection-level attribute tags. Default value: .

para.b: EnableConnectionLevelAttributes is supported on all runtimes.

remarks.para: The default behavior is to set the SqlConnection DataSource as the tag. If enabled, SqlConnection DataSource will be parsed and the server name will be sent as the or tag, the instance name will be sent as the tag, and the port will be sent as the tag if it is not 1433 (the default port).

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.Enrich
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an with the raw SqlCommand object.
member.remarks:
Enrich is only executed on .NET and .NET Core runtimes. The parameters passed to the enrich action are:
The being enriched.
The name of the event. Currently only "OnCustom" is used but more events may be added in the future.
The raw SqlCommand object from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the .

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.Filter
member.summary: Gets or sets a filter function that determines whether or not to collect telemetry about a command.
member.remarks:
Filter is only executed on .NET and .NET Core runtimes. Notes:
The first parameter passed to the filter function is the raw SqlCommand object for the command being executed.
The return value for the filter function is interpreted as:
If filter returns , the command is collected.
If filter returns or throws an exception the command is NOT collected.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient.SqlClientTraceInstrumentationOptions.RecordException
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the exception will be recorded as or not. Default value: .

para.b: RecordException is only supported on .NET and .NET Core runtimes.

member.summary: ListenerHandler base class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the name of the .

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the supports NULL .

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.ListenerHandler.OnEventWritten(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Method called for an event which does not have 'Start', 'Stop' or 'Exception' as suffix.
member.param: An object that represent the value being passed as a payload for the event.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1
member.summary: PropertyFetcher fetches a property from an object.
member.typeparam: The type of the property being fetched.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1.TryFetch(System.Object,`0@)
member.summary: Try to fetch the property from the object.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.ExceptionExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Exception)
member.summary: Returns a culture-independent string representation of the given object, appropriate for diagnostics tracing.
member.returns: Exception as string with no culture.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard
member.summary: Methods for guarding against exception throwing values.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or empty.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is zero.
member.param: The message to use in the thrown exception.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfInvalidTimeout(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not considered a valid timeout.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Double,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNotOfType``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not of the expected type.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type attempted to convert to.
member.returns: The value casted to the specified type.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Trace.SemanticConventions
member.summary: Constants for semantic attribute names outlined by the OpenTelemetry specifications. and .

member.summary: Extension methods to simplify registering of dependency instrumentation.

member.summary: Enables SqlClient instrumentation.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.summary: Enables SqlClient instrumentation.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.summary: Enables SqlClient instrumentation.
member.param: Name which is used when retrieving options.
